core_mechanism: stabilization of an extended object at a nonzero equilibrium size by an effective potential balancing a size-reducing tension against the energy of a topologically quantized flux/charge, with the discrete flux quantum fixing the minimum and small oscillations about it giving the fluctuation spectrum
brief_reason: The abstract states the branes are stabilized against shrinking by quantized worldvolume U(1) fluxes and that masses and a spectrum of small fluctuations are derived from the Born-Infeld (energy) action, which is exactly a quantized-flux-versus-tension energy balance with a finite-size minimum and harmonic fluctuations around it.
